texto: When no one is looking,I swallow deserts and cloudsand chew on mountainsknowing they are sweet bones!When no one is lookingand I want to kiss God,I just lift my own hand to my mouth.
explicacao: Citação de The Rubaiyat of Hafiz sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “When no one is looking,I swallow deserts and cloudsand chew on mountainsknowing they are sweet bo…” articula amor, poetry, sufi em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como sufi.
